arts.ttl: Burnley sign former Tottenham Hotspur youngster Marcus Edwards on loan from Sporting Lisbon
arts.sum: Burnley announce that they have pulled off a deadline-day coup by agreeing a loan deal for Sporting Lisbon winger Marcus Edwards.

arts.ttl: Burnley move early on transfer deadline day to announce signing of exciting winger
arts.sum: Burnley have moved early on transfer deadline day by announcing the signing of Sporting winger Marcus Edwards.

arts.ttl: Entourage confirms Burnley interest in player – Clarets need to step up quickly to overcome tough competition
arts.sum: Burnley are among the clubs chasing Lazio’s Loum Tchaouna on deadline of the winter market, according to L’Equipe. Last summer, the winger arrived at the Italian club from Salernitana and signed a contract until 2029. arts.ttl: Scott Parker welcomes Manuel Benson's Burnley return for Portsmouth clash but urges caution
arts.sum: Scott Parker has welcomed the long-awaited return of Manuel Benson, but has warned the Burnley winger is still not 100 per cent match fit.

arts.ttl: Deadline day: All the updates from Oxford United and the Championship
arts.sum: The transfer window closes at 11pm tonight Oxford United have signed five players already this window going into deadline day Centre back Michal Helik, attackers Stan Mills and Ole Romeny, and striker Tom Bradshaw have all arrived on permanent deals, while Chelsea midfielder Alex Matos has joined on loan

arts.ttl: What to expect from Burnley’s transfer deadline day as winger closes in on Turf Moor switch
arts.sum: Burnley have until 11pm tonight to finalise their transfer business
